title: Use mean or true lunar nodes

positions.summary: Use the mean ascending node polynomial and place Ketu exactly opposite.
Use the oscillating true node; this is not implemented in v0.1.

default_policy.rationale: The selected polynomial is deterministic, locally implemented, and explicitly disclosed.

user_disclosure: Rahu and Ketu are mean nodes; a true-node chart may differ near sign, nakshatra, or sub-lord boundaries.
